sections.rail_summary: A missing link arrives already shaped like confirmation.
sections.script_anchor: 1912 announcement through the thesis: the fake worked because the story was ready.
typography_cues: It had always been a forgery
sections.source_safe_motion: settled plate drift, restrained microscope glint, rail active panel fade only

sections.rail_summary: Dawson, Woodward, and the brain-first model make the specimen feel inevitable.
sections.script_anchor: Dawson, Woodward, Geological Society announcement, theory fit, and museum endorsement.

sections.rail_summary: Skepticism existed, but follow-up finds and institutional cost kept it contained.
sections.script_anchor: Early anatomical reservations, follow-up corroboration, and the cost of calling fraud.
sections.source_safe_motion: context rows compress around objections; source plate remains unmarked

sections.rail_summary: National expectation and museum authority turn skepticism into a social cost.
sections.script_anchor: Five conditions begin: national expectation and institutional prestige.
typography_cues: what the field wanted to hear
sections.source_safe_motion: warmer active-panel emphasis; source-integrated lamp pulse reserved for ambient layer

sections.rail_summary: Visible inconsistencies and poor provenance disappear under repetition.
sections.script_anchor: Early inconsistencies, uncontrolled provenance, and layers of citation.
sections.source_safe_motion: slow rail context progression; no admin-paper foreground treatment

sections.rail_summary: Fluorine, microscopy, X-ray, and chemical analysis expose the mismatch.
sections.script_anchor: 1949 fluorine analysis and the 1953 systematic examination.
sections.source_safe_motion: microscope and practical-lamp cues become the strongest planned ambient moment; no screens or glow panels

sections.rail_title: The system was disposed to accept it
sections.rail_summary: The forger mattered less than the institution's acceptance machinery.
sections.script_anchor: Dawson suspicion, gullibility reframed, and standards that missed the specific problem.
sections.source_safe_motion: rail cadence slows; right-rail captions remain script-locked and sparse

sections.rail_summary: Authority processed the evidence through a channel that could not ask the right question.
sections.script_anchor: Museum collections, 1953 exposure, mechanism statement, and final receipts line.
sections.source_safe_motion: end-state rail settles, chapter/caption text suppresses before end-screen window in later proof

effect_map_moments.story_function: Institutional prestige makes public skepticism expensive.

effect_map_moments.story_function: Testing reveals what the authority story hid.
